meaning: adj.[化]锡的,含有锡的,含二价锡的
examples: Synergistic effects are found in the complexes of stannous oleate and sulfurated isobutylene or tricresol phosphate.
In order to reduce tungsten to W5 + completely, titanium trichloride or stannous chloride were generally used as reducing agents.
Rhodium in rhodium plating bath was determined by spectrophotometric method using potassium iodine and stannous chloride as chromogenic agent .
